title: Fuel Pricing Consultant / Degvielas cenu konsultants/(-e)

summary.lv: Circle K Biznesa centrs Rīgā meklē Fuel Pricing konsultantu (1.5 gadu līgumdarbs), kas uzturēs degvielas produktu datus un cenu uzstādījumus ERP sistēmā Eiropas tirgū, identificēs un risinās ikdienas cenu kļūdas un atbalstīs lietotājus.
summary.en: Circle K Business Centre Riga is hiring a Fuel Pricing Consultant (1.5-year contract) to maintain fuel product master data and pricing setups in the ERP system across the European market, investigate daily pricing errors, and support users.
